title: PROTOCOLO OFICIAL PARA LA FAUNA DEL LPZ-ULPGC
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ajfcj","text":"This protocol results from our experience in the daily practice of zooarchaeological analysis, which includes the identification of remains of mammals, reptiles, birds, fish, and insects. With this document, we hope to improve and facilitate the work during the different phases that occur from the time the material is recovered from the archaeological site until it reaches our tables at the Laboratorio de Zooarqueologia (LPZ) of the University of Las Palmas de Gran Canaria.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":132,"length":54},{"style":"bold","offset":219,"length":31},{"style":"bold","offset":394,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fmpfl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a2s6","text":"This document is a working tool containing our recommendations. We hope it covers the various aspects and difficulties in collecting and shipping faunal material.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":17,"length":14},{"style":"bold","offset":47,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f5f8p","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6h871","text":"The protocol is currently available in English and Spanish","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fqkf4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cdbdb","text":" If you use the protocol, please cite as: Group of the Zooarqueología Laboratory  of Las Palmas (LPZ),   (2024). Official protocol for the fauna of the LPZ-ULPGC, version X (version number used), DOI of the protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":40},{"style":"bold","offset":41,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bke0n","text":"----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Este protocolo es fruto de nuestra experiencia en la práctica diaria del análisis zooarqueológico, que integra la identificación de restos de mamíferos, reptiles, aves, peces e insectos. Con este documento esperamos mejorar y facilitar el trabajo durante las distintas fases que se dan desde que el material se recupera en el yacimiento arqueológico hasta que llega a nuestras mesas del Laboratorio de Zooarqueologia (LPZ) de la Universidad de Las Palmas de Gran Canaria.\n","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":238,"length":53},{"style":"bold","offset":322,"length":30},{"style":"bold","offset":493,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bs55a","text":"Este documento es una herramienta de trabajo que contiene nuestras recomendaciones. Esperamos cubra los diversos aspectos y dificultades que entraña la recogida y el envío de material faunístico. ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":18,"length":26},{"style":"bold","offset":67,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5rp4c","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"edebk","text":"El protocolo está actualmente disponible en inglés y español","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ck2v","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cv3uo","text":"Si utiliza el protocolo, cite como:  Grupo del Laboratorio de Zooarqueología de las Palmas (LPZ), (2024). Protocolo oficial para la fauna del LPZ-ULPGC, versión X (numero de la versión usada),  DOI del protocolo","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":34},{"style":"bold","offset":35,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
